name: NOROO PAINT & COATINGS Co., Ltd.
summary: NOROO PAINT & COATINGS Co., Ltd. develops, manufactures, and sells paints in South Korea and internationally. It provides floor, waterproof, heavy duty, PCM, household electrical appliance, and industrial coating products, as well as architecture and automotive refinish paint products; and resin products. The company offers its products under the SOON&SOO, Pantone Paint, YEGREENA, NOROOWAY, HiQ, Q-Fit, Natural, Color stain, Pororo Paint, and Energy Saver brands. It also engages in the market research and networking activities. The company was founded in 1945 and is based in Anyang-si, South Korea. NOROO PAINT & COATINGS Co., Ltd is a subsidiary of NOROO Holdings Co., Ltd.
